title: Boeing delivers more airplanes than rival Airbus during 1Q
text: The Boeing Company (NYSE:BA) delivered more aircraft in a single quarter than its rival Airbus for the first time since mid-2018 according to Bloomberg Intelligence, a sign the troubled airplane manufacturer is recovering following a series of challenges, including two deadly crashes involving its 737 MAX jets and production issues.  The company said on Tuesday it delivered 130 aircraft during the quarter, up 37% from 95 in the comparable period in 2022.

title: IS&S receives Production Order for its GPS Unit from Boeing for the T-7A Red Hawk Trainer
text: EXTON, Pa.--(BUSINESS WIRE)--Innovative Solutions & Support (IS&S) (NASDAQ: ISSC) received a production order from The Boeing Company (NYSE: BA) to provide its Global Positioning System (GPS) Sensor Units for the Boeing T-7A Red Hawk trainer. Deliveries will begin in July 2023 with additional options for continuous deliveries throughout the life of the current U.S. Air Force Program.
